Params: {3: 'Alpha rides the motorcycle toward the massive structure, with you behind her. The warm house fades into the dusk behind you.'}
{3: 'After you travel for a while and leave the neighborhood behind, the surroundings grow quiet again.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Alpha', 3: 'These illusions... some of them really do come from inside me.', 4: '1', 18: '100017397'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'It might have something to do with what happened in the mist.', 4: '1', 18: '100017398'}
{3: 'Neither of you says anything after that. The engine\'s roar echoes down the empty road.'}
{3: 'Soon, the familiar rift appears at the end of the road.'}
{3: 'You pass through the rift. There\'s a brief stretch of darkness and disorientation. Then you smell grit and dust.'}
{3: 'You\'re in a wide wasteland, almost completely silent.'}
{3: 'In the center is a massive impact crater that makes your chest feel tight just looking at it. At the bottom stands a giant structure, badly ruined but still partly intact—Babylonia.'}
{3: 'Whatever hit here tried to wipe everything out. The ground is torn up and folded over, forming a ring-shaped valley hundreds of meters deep.'}
{3: 'Babylonia should\'ve been smashed to dust. But clearly, something was done before it fell. That\'s why part of its main structure is still standing in the crater.'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'This is between me and her. Leave it to me.', 4: '1', 18: '100017401'}
{3: 'The engine growls. The motorcycle shoots down the slope and heads straight for the crater\'s center.'}
{3: 'Downhill, faster and faster, then up the slope at the crater floor, using every angled surface to climb.'}
{3: 'The motorcycle hits a ramp and jumps up onto a platform. Alpha looks down, and her eyes meet someone looking up at her.'}
{3: 'The motorcycle crashes to the ground, the impact shattering a few stone slabs.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Alpha hops off. Her right hand goes to the hilt at her waist, and the blade lights up bright red.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Shadow', 3: 'Since you came to offer your body so nicely, I\'ll make it quick.', 4: '2', 18: '100017404'}
{3: 'Shadow grips the scabbard with her left hand and slowly draws the long blade. Red electricity coils around it and crackles in the air.'}
{3: 'As soon as the words leave her mouth, both figures vanish. ', 17: '1'}
{1: '1', 3: ' A heartbeat later, two long blades crash together with a sharp scream.', 22: '1'}
{3: 'The moment the blades meet, a shockwave sweeps across the entire platform and throws every bit of debris into the air.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Shadow', 3: 'Once I realized this world, this pale mist, would eventually disappear, I started looking for a way out.', 4: '1', 18: '100017405'}
{2: 'Shadow', 3: 'And finally, I used the virus to draw you in!', 4: '1', 18: '100017406'}
{3: 'Shadow moves fast, almost unreal, and her blade turns into a storm of slashes.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Shadow', 3: 'I will take over your body, and claim MY right to live!', 4: '1', 18: '100017407'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Alpha gives a derisive chuckle, her razor-sharp blade carving a fresh wound into Shadow.'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'You\'re a pathetic illusion. A shadow should know its place—under its master\'s feet.', 4: '1', 18: '100017408'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Alpha', 3: '<color=#ffffffff>I, am Lucia, I, am Alpha. I, am the original... This story begins with ME!</color>', 4: '1', 18: '100017410'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Alpha\'s blade tears through the air, striking with devastating force toward Shadow\'s heart.'}
{3: 'But Shadow doesn\'t dodge. She steps forward instead, walking right into the killing blow.'}
{3: 'The crimson blade punches through her chest. Shadow keeps smiling and keeps moving forward, one step at a time.'}
{3: 'White mist surges to her like it has a will of its own. The instant it touches the wound, the edges start to close and heal.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Shadow', 3: '<color=#ffffffff>Then I shall be the one to end your story!</color>', 4: '2', 18: '100017411'}
{1: '1', 3: 'In the next moment, she breaks apart. Her whole body bursts into pale mist, and the fog rushes straight at Alpha.'}
{3: 'Alpha\'s pupils contract sharply. She jumps back, trying to get out of the way.'}
{3: 'The mist hits her head-on and forces its way into her body, pushing in from every possible opening.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Shadow', 3: 'I know you\'re incredibly strong, so I never planned to fight you head-on...', 4: '2', 18: '100017413'}
{2: 'Shadow', 3: 'I\'ll take your M.I.N.D. Starting with your soul, I\'ll swallow this body whole!', 4: '2', 18: '100017414'}
{3: 'Alpha drops to her knees like something ripped the life out of her.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'A second later, she jerks her head up. The light in her red eyes flickers hard, switching between wild and clear.'}
{3: 'Her voice comes through clenched teeth, low and strained, like she\'s fighting something inside her.'}
{3: 'Her body shakes violently. With the last bit of consciousness she has, she snaps her head toward you.'}
{3: 'She throws her long blade with everything she has. It spins through the air and sticks into the ground at your feet.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'The part of her gaze that is truly Alpha fades fast.'}
{3: 'As soon as she says it, the last bit of clarity in her eyes goes out completely, like a solitary island swallowed by a tide.'}
{3: 'Crimson energy bursts out of her like a broken dam. Virus power and crackling electricity surge outward, tearing the stone slabs apart.'}
{3: 'Madness flickers in her eyes as she locks onto the only living target here: you, the commandant.'}
